sourceAmbiguity: Timeout presentation needed to distinguish expired sessions from generic auth errors.
decisionTaken: Mapped idle and absolute timeout triggers to the session-expired screen and recovery-only authority posture.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Timeout copy follows SessionTerminationSettlement.trigger and does not imply an active session.
operationalRisk: Countdown UI must not promise recovery after absolute timeout unless the return intent remains recoverable.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Bind any live countdown component to session-governor expiry fields and keep reduced-motion behavior.
